description:
A Solar Sales Representative needs to prepare a Solar Resource Assessment Report for a potential commercial client near Phoenix, Arizona. Using the Phoenix, AZ TMY weather data file bundled with SAM (directory path available in `/home/ga/.SAM/solar_resource_dir.txt`), compute key solar resource statistics and output a structured JSON report. 

The report must include annual GHI, DNI, and DHI (in kWh/m²/year), Peak Sun Hours (PSH) per day, annual average ambient temperature (°C), and annual average wind speed (m/s). Additionally, calculate the total GHI (kWh/m²/month) for each of the 12 months and a recommended tilt in degrees using the formula `latitude * 0.76 + 3.1`. 

Save the results to `/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/phoenix_site_assessment.json` using this exact structure:
{
    "location": "Phoenix, AZ",
    "latitude": <float>,
    "longitude": <float>,
    "annual_ghi_kwh_per_m2": <float>,
    "annual_dni_kwh_per_m2": <float>,
    "annual_dhi_kwh_per_m2": <float>,
    "peak_sun_hours_per_day": <float>,
    "avg_temperature_c": <float>,
    "avg_wind_speed_ms": <float>,
    "recommended_tilt_deg": <float>,
    "monthly_ghi_kwh_per_m2": [<jan>, <feb>, ..., <dec>],
    "weather_file_used": "<filename>"
}
